title: paraprasophyllum helophilum
intro: Paraprasophyllum helophilum, also known as the swamp greenhood, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paraprasophyllum helophilum include the potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are typically used for their medicinal and therapeutic properties.
